resetAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset all guides?

search.title: Search
search.description: Search for users, discussions and places using the search bar.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Replies and updates appear here. A red dot indicates unread notifications.

bottomnav.title: Navigation
bottomnav.description: Five main sections: Agora (discussions), Clubs, Messages, Map and Home. Navigate between sections here.

header.title: What is Agora?
header.description: Agora is a public discussion forum where users can discuss local, national and EU matters.

scope.title: Feed Scope
scope.description: Choose which discussions to see: followed, local, national or EU-level discussions.

sort.title: Sorting
sort.description: Sort discussions by recent activity, newest or most popular.

newthread.title: New Discussion
newthread.description: Start a new discussion by writing a title and content. You can attach topic tags and choose the discussion level.

threadcard.title: Discussion Card
threadcard.description: Each card shows the title, author, vote count and number of replies. Vote with arrows or click to open.

header.title: What are Clubs?
header.description: Clubs are group discussions around a specific topic or community. You can join open clubs or create your own.

search.title: Search Clubs
search.description: Find clubs by name or filter by category.

create.title: Create a Club
create.description: Create your own club by pressing this button. Choose a name, description, category and visibility.

clubcard.title: Club Card
clubcard.description: Each card shows the club name, description, member count and category. Click to join or view.

header.title: Private Messages
header.description: Here you see all your private message conversations. You can start a new conversation from a user's profile.

conversation.title: Conversation
conversation.description: Click a conversation to open messages. Unread messages are marked with blue.

header.title: Eulesia Map
header.description: The map view shows discussions, clubs and places geographically. Zoom and pan to find content near you.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter map content by type, date range and language.

point.title: Map Points
point.description: Click a map point to see details. You can navigate directly to the discussion or club.

header.title: Home
header.description: Home is your personal space. Here you see your rooms, invitations and recent activity.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Create public or private rooms for discussions. Invite other users to private rooms.

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.description: Here you see your room invitations. You can accept or decline an invitation.

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.description: A quick overview of your latest discussions and clubs.
